message:
fix: manifest sort, evaluator bigint precision, cache key collisions

1. Manifest lexicographic sort picked wrong "latest" version for
   datasets with 10+ appends (e.g. "9.manifest" > "10.manifest").
   Now sorts numerically via parseInt.

2. CAST(bigint AS BIGINT) round-tripped through Number(), losing
   precision for values > 2^53. Now short-circuits when already bigint.

3. compare() fallback for cross-type bigint/number used Number(bigint)
   which loses precision for large values. Now converts number side to
   BigInt via Math.trunc, with Infinity handling.

4. Cache key used `w.column ?? ""` instead of NULL_SENTINEL, and
   omitted w.args.default_ — lag/lead queries with different defaults
   could return cached results from the wrong query.
